---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# DO NOT MODIFY!!!!
#----------------------------------------------------------------------------#

```{r}
##############################################################################
# Workflow: Create Separate Databases for Each Excel File Tab
#
# Reads all .xlsm files from "2.Extracted" and "3.Quality control" sub-folders
# across Boris / Charity / Jabesh / Judy, and writes 13 CSV databases.
#
# Requirements:  install.packages(c("readxl", "dplyr", "stringr", "tibble"))
##############################################################################

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

# ── 0. CONFIGURATION ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

workspace         <- r"(C:\Users\ANowak\OneDrive - CGIAR\AE-SysRev-shared)"
extractors        <- c("Boris", "Charity", "Jabesh", "Judy")
target_subfolders <- c("2.Extracted", "3.Quality control")
output_dir        <- file.path(workspace, "databases")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ── 1. HELPERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Parse doc_id and standardised version from a filename.
# Handles all separator styles: "v1710 - JM00466", "v.1710-JM00466", "v3007 – BS0003"
parse_filename <- function(filename) {
  base  <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(filename))
  parts <- str_split(base, "\\s*[-\u2013\u2014]\\s*", n = 2)[[1]]
  if (length(parts) == 2) {
    version <- str_replace_all(str_trim(parts[1]), "[. ]", "")  # v.1710 → v1710
    doc_id  <- str_trim(parts[2])
  } else {
    version <- NA_character_
    doc_id  <- base
  }
  list(doc_id = doc_id, version = version)
}

# Convert Excel column letter(s) to a 1-based integer index (A=1, AA=27, …)
col_letter_to_int <- function(col) {
  chars <- strsplit(toupper(trimws(col)), "")[[1]]
  Reduce(function(acc, ch) acc * 26L + (utf8ToInt(ch) - utf8ToInt("A") + 1L),
         chars, 0L)
}

# Read a full sheet as a character data frame, returning NULL on error
read_sheet_safe <- function(filepath, sheet) {
  tryCatch(
    suppressMessages(
      read_excel(filepath, sheet = sheet, col_names = FALSE, col_types = "text")
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# Check whether a named sheet exists in a workbook
sheet_exists <- function(filepath, sheet_name) {
  tryCatch(sheet_name %in% excel_sheets(filepath), error = function(e) FALSE)
}

# FIXED layout: each variable is a single scalar cell
extract_fixed <- function(raw, db_def, doc_id) {
  row_data <- list(doc_id = doc_id)
  for (v in db_def$vars) {
    ci  <- col_letter_to_int(v$col)
    ri  <- v$row
    val <- if (nrow(raw) >= ri && ncol(raw) >= ci) raw[[ri, ci]] else NA_character_
    row_data[[v$new_name]] <- val
  }
  as_tibble(row_data)
}

# DYNAMIC layout: values flow downward from start_row; keep rows up to last non-empty
extract_dynamic <- function(raw, db_def, doc_id) {
  start <- db_def$start_row
  if (nrow(raw) < start) return(NULL)

  col_data <- lapply(db_def$vars, function(v) {
    ci <- col_letter_to_int(v$col)
    if (ncol(raw) < ci) rep(NA_character_, nrow(raw) - start + 1L)
    else as.character(raw[[ci]][start:nrow(raw)])
  })
  names(col_data) <- sapply(db_def$vars, `[[`, "new_name")

  df <- as_tibble(col_data)
  n  <- max(sapply(df, function(x) sum(!is.na(x) & nchar(trimws(x)) > 0L)),
            na.rm = TRUE)
  if (n == 0L) return(NULL)
  bind_cols(tibble(doc_id = doc_id), df[seq_len(n), , drop = FALSE])
}

# ── 2. COLLECT ELIGIBLE FILES ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

collect_files <- function() {
  records <- list()
  for (ext in extractors) {
    for (sub in target_subfolders) {
      dir_path <- file.path(workspace, ext, sub)
      if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) next
      files <- list.files(dir_path, pattern = "\\.xlsm$",
                          full.names = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
      for (fp in files) {
        p      <- parse_filename(fp)
        status <- ifelse(grepl("2\\.Extracted", sub, ignore.case = TRUE),
                         "extracted", "qc")
        records[[length(records) + 1]] <- tibble(
          filepath  = fp,
          doc_id    = p$doc_id,
          version   = p$version,
          extractor = str_extract(p$doc_id, "^[A-Z]{2}"),
          status    = status
        )
      }
    }
  }
  bind_rows(records)
}

file_list <- collect_files()
message("Found ", nrow(file_list), " eligible files.")

# ── 3. DATABASE DEFINITIONS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Encoded directly from Template-Database-Equivalents.xlsx (Sheet1, col I = db name,
# col J = new variable name, col E = source column, col G = value start cell).

db_defs <- list(

  study_characteristics = list(
    tab = "1.Meta", mode = "fixed",
    vars = list(
      list(col="C", row=3L, new_name="version"),
      list(col="C", row=4L, new_name="extractor"),
      list(col="C", row=5L, new_name="document"),
      list(col="C", row=6L, new_name="doc_id_src"),
      list(col="C", row=7L, new_name="doi"),
      list(col="C", row=8L, new_name="title"),
      list(col="C", row=9L, new_name="doi_linked")
    )
  ),

  area_general = list(
    tab="2a.Area", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A",  new_name="country"),       list(col="B",  new_name="area"),
      list(col="C",  new_name="area_type"),      list(col="D",  new_name="admin_high"),
      list(col="E",  new_name="admin_high_type"),list(col="F",  new_name="site_id"),
      list(col="G",  new_name="coord_source"),   list(col="H",  new_name="coord_lat_n"),
      list(col="I",  new_name="cood_lat"),        list(col="J",  new_name="coord_long_n"),
      list(col="K",  new_name="cood_long"),       list(col="L",  new_name="coord_buff"),
      list(col="M",  new_name="coord_join"),      list(col="N",  new_name="rainy_n"),
      list(col="O",  new_name="season1_s"),       list(col="P",  new_name="season1_e"),
      list(col="Q",  new_name="season1_l"),       list(col="R",  new_name="season2_s"),
      list(col="S",  new_name="season2_e"),       list(col="T",  new_name="season2_l"),
      list(col="U",  new_name="farm_type"),       list(col="V",  new_name="prodsys_type"),
      list(col="W",  new_name="source_2a"),       list(col="X",  new_name="pg_2a"),
      list(col="Y",  new_name="table_2a"),        list(col="Z",  new_name="fig_2a"),
      list(col="AA", new_name="note_2a")
    )
  ),

  production_system = list(
    tab="2b.Farm", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="site_id"),  list(col="B", new_name="prod_categ"),
      list(col="C", new_name="prod_typ"), list(col="D", new_name="prod_name"),
      list(col="E", new_name="prod_other"),list(col="F", new_name="source_2b"),
      list(col="G", new_name="pg_2b"),    list(col="H", new_name="table_2b"),
      list(col="I", new_name="fig_2b"),   list(col="J", new_name="note_2b")
    )
  ),

  area_climate = list(
    tab="2c.Climate", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="site_id"),   list(col="B", new_name="clim_yr"),
      list(col="C", new_name="clim_var"),  list(col="D", new_name="clim_season"),
      list(col="E", new_name="clim_stat"), list(col="F", new_name="clim_val"),
      list(col="G", new_name="clim_unit"), list(col="H", new_name="source_2c"),
      list(col="I", new_name="pg_2c"),     list(col="J", new_name="table_2c"),
      list(col="K", new_name="fig_2c"),    list(col="L", new_name="note_2c")
    )
  ),

  # 3a.Methods is a fixed grid; values in col E, free-text notes in col F
  method = list(
    tab="3a.Methods", mode="fixed",
    vars = list(
      list(col="E",row=3L,  new_name="design"),              list(col="F",row=3L,  new_name="design_note"),
      list(col="E",row=4L,  new_name="design_sub"),          list(col="F",row=4L,  new_name="design_sub_note"),
      list(col="E",row=5L,  new_name="design_other"),        list(col="F",row=5L,  new_name="design_other_note"),
      list(col="E",row=6L,  new_name="design_clear"),        list(col="F",row=6L,  new_name="design_clear_note"),
      list(col="E",row=7L,  new_name="sampl_strateg"),       list(col="F",row=7L,  new_name="sampl_strateg_note"),
      list(col="E",row=8L,  new_name="sampl_strateg_spec"),  list(col="F",row=8L,  new_name="sampl_strateg_spec_note"),
      list(col="E",row=9L,  new_name="sampl_stratif"),       list(col="F",row=9L,  new_name="sampl_stratif_note"),
      list(col="E",row=10L, new_name="sampl_clear"),         list(col="F",row=10L, new_name="sampl_clear_note"),
      list(col="E",row=11L, new_name="sampl_spec"),          list(col="F",row=11L, new_name="sampl_spec_note"),
      list(col="E",row=12L, new_name="select_bias"),         list(col="F",row=12L, new_name="select_bias_note"),
      list(col="E",row=13L, new_name="compar_group"),        list(col="F",row=13L, new_name="compar_group_note"),
      list(col="E",row=14L, new_name="group_type_spec"),     list(col="F",row=14L, new_name="group_type_spec_note"),
      list(col="E",row=15L, new_name="group_assign"),        list(col="F",row=15L, new_name="group_assign_note"),
      list(col="E",row=16L, new_name="group_t_n"),           list(col="F",row=16L, new_name="group_t_n_note"),
      list(col="E",row=17L, new_name="group_c_n"),           list(col="F",row=17L, new_name="group_c_n_note"),
      list(col="E",row=18L, new_name="base_bal"),            list(col="F",row=18L, new_name="base_bal_note"),
      list(col="E",row=19L, new_name="spill_risk"),          list(col="F",row=19L, new_name="spill_risk_note"),
      list(col="E",row=20L, new_name="part_att"),            list(col="F",row=20L, new_name="part_att_note"),
      list(col="E",row=21L, new_name="causal_stage"),        list(col="F",row=21L, new_name="causal_stage_note"),
      list(col="E",row=22L, new_name="causal_design"),       list(col="F",row=22L, new_name="causal_design_note"),
      list(col="E",row=23L, new_name="endogen_treat"),       list(col="F",row=23L, new_name="endogen_treat_note"),
      list(col="E",row=24L, new_name="reverse_causal"),      list(col="F",row=24L, new_name="reverse_causal_note"),
      list(col="E",row=25L, new_name="confounding"),         list(col="F",row=25L, new_name="confounding_note"),
      list(col="E",row=26L, new_name="robust_check"),        list(col="F",row=26L, new_name="robust_check_note"),
      list(col="E",row=27L, new_name="diff_eff"),            list(col="F",row=27L, new_name="diff_eff_note"),
      list(col="E",row=28L, new_name="outcome_source"),      list(col="F",row=28L, new_name="outcome_source_note"),
      list(col="E",row=29L, new_name="temp_struc"),          list(col="F",row=29L, new_name="temp_struc_note"),
      list(col="E",row=30L, new_name="data_start_m"),        list(col="F",row=30L, new_name="data_start_m_note"),
      list(col="E",row=31L, new_name="data_start_y"),        list(col="F",row=31L, new_name="data_start_y_note"),
      list(col="E",row=32L, new_name="data_end_m"),          list(col="F",row=32L, new_name="data_end_m_note"),
      list(col="E",row=33L, new_name="data_end_y"),          list(col="F",row=33L, new_name="data_end_y_note"),
      list(col="E",row=34L, new_name="data_freq"),           list(col="F",row=34L, new_name="data_freq_note"),
      list(col="E",row=35L, new_name="measure_unit_n"),      list(col="F",row=35L, new_name="measure_unit_n_note"),
      list(col="E",row=36L, new_name="data_tool"),           list(col="F",row=36L, new_name="data_tool_note"),
      list(col="E",row=37L, new_name="analysis_clear"),      list(col="F",row=37L, new_name="analysis_clear_note"),
      list(col="E",row=38L, new_name="outcome_report"),      list(col="F",row=38L, new_name="outcome_report_note"),
      list(col="E",row=39L, new_name="ethics"),              list(col="F",row=39L, new_name="ethics_note"),
      list(col="E",row=40L, new_name="replicab"),            list(col="F",row=40L, new_name="replicab_note"),
      list(col="E",row=41L, new_name="open_data"),           list(col="F",row=41L, new_name="open_data_note")
    )
  ),

  method_sample = list(
    tab="3b.Sample", mode="dynamic", start_row=5L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="group_type"), list(col="B", new_name="group_id"),
      list(col="C", new_name="group_spec"), list(col="D", new_name="sample_size"),
      list(col="E", new_name="sample_unit"),list(col="F", new_name="source_3b"),
      list(col="G", new_name="pg_3b"),      list(col="H", new_name="table_3b"),
      list(col="I", new_name="fig_3c"),     list(col="J", new_name="note_3c")
    )
  ),

  options = list(
    tab="4a.StratList", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="option_type"),    list(col="B", new_name="option"),
      list(col="C", new_name="option_yr"),       list(col="D", new_name="option_who"),
      list(col="E", new_name="option_who_spec"), list(col="F", new_name="note_option")
    )
  ),

  outcomes = list(
    tab="4b.OutcList", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="outcome_type"),   list(col="B", new_name="outcome"),
      list(col="C", new_name="outcome_unit"),    list(col="D", new_name="outcome_formula"),
      list(col="E", new_name="note_outc")
    )
  ),

  link1_rationale_option = list(
    tab="5a.RatStrat", mode="dynamic", start_row=5L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="rationale_typ"), list(col="B", new_name="clim"),
      list(col="C", new_name="nonclim"),
      list(col="D", new_name="option"),         # col D = "strategy" (v1002 adds rationale_txt here)
      list(col="E", new_name="option_level"),   list(col="F", new_name="link1_method"),
      list(col="G", new_name="link1_type"),     list(col="H", new_name="link1_p"),
      list(col="I", new_name="source_5a"),      list(col="J", new_name="pg_5a"),
      list(col="K", new_name="table_5a"),       list(col="L", new_name="fig_5a"),
      list(col="M", new_name="note_5a")
    )
  ),

  link2_option_outcome = list(
    tab="5b.StratOutc", mode="dynamic", start_row=7L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A",  new_name="option_t"),     list(col="B",  new_name="option_c"),
      list(col="C",  new_name="outcome"),       list(col="D",  new_name="outcome_prod"),
      list(col="E",  new_name="outcome_who"),   list(col="F",  new_name="who_spec"),
      list(col="G",  new_name="outcome_yr"),    list(col="H",  new_name="outcome_siteid"),
      list(col="I",  new_name="est_type"),      list(col="J",  new_name="obs_type"),
      list(col="K",  new_name="est_gr"),        list(col="L",  new_name="est_subgr"),
      list(col="M",  new_name="est_val"),       list(col="N",  new_name="est_stat"),
      list(col="O",  new_name="est_stat_other"),list(col="P",  new_name="est_p"),
      list(col="Q",  new_name="error_val"),     list(col="R",  new_name="error_type"),
      list(col="S",  new_name="est_conf"),      list(col="T",  new_name="est_method"),
      list(col="U",  new_name="path_id"),       list(col="V",  new_name="patg_type"),
      list(col="W",  new_name="moderator"),     # absent in v3007 — NAs will fill
      list(col="X",  new_name="source_5b"),     list(col="Y",  new_name="pg_5b"),
      list(col="Z",  new_name="table_5b"),      list(col="AA", new_name="fig_5b"),
      list(col="AB", new_name="note_5b")
    )
  ),

  link3_option_med_outcome = list(
    tab="5c.Mediators", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="path_id"),        list(col="B", new_name="med"),
      list(col="C", new_name="med_unit"),        list(col="D", new_name="med_type"),
      list(col="E", new_name="med_p"),           list(col="F", new_name="med_conf"),
      list(col="G", new_name="med_size_val"),    list(col="H", new_name="med_size_unit"),
      list(col="I", new_name="med_method"),      list(col="J", new_name="med_method_other"),
      list(col="K", new_name="source_5c"),       list(col="L", new_name="pg_5c"),
      list(col="M", new_name="table_5c"),        list(col="N", new_name="fig_5c"),
      list(col="O", new_name="note_5c")
    )
  ),

  link4_other_vars = list(
    tab="5d.OtherV", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="var"),            list(col="B", new_name="var_role"),
      list(col="C", new_name="var_unit"),
      list(col="D", new_name="option"),          # v1002: var_clim in col D
      list(col="E", new_name="outcome"),         list(col="F", new_name="link_direction"),
      list(col="G", new_name="link_p"),          list(col="H", new_name="link_conf"),
      list(col="I", new_name="link_method"),     list(col="J", new_name="link_method_other"),
      list(col="K", new_name="site_id"),         # absent in v1908 / v3007 / v1710
      list(col="L", new_name="source_5d"),       list(col="M", new_name="pg_5d"),
      list(col="N", new_name="table_5d"),        list(col="O", new_name="fig_5d"),
      list(col="P", new_name="note_5d")
    )
  ),

  # Only present in v1002 files
  effectiveness = list(
    tab="5e.Effectiveness", mode="dynamic", start_row=6L,
    vars = list(
      list(col="A", new_name="outcome"),         list(col="B", new_name="outcome_spec"),
      list(col="C", new_name="outcome_risk"),    list(col="D", new_name="clim_var"),
      list(col="E", new_name="clim_var_other"),  list(col="F", new_name="risk_sys"),
      list(col="G", new_name="risk_dyn"),        list(col="H", new_name="risk_sign"),
      list(col="I", new_name="risk_certain"),    list(col="J", new_name="note_5e")
    )
  )
)

# ── 4. MAIN LOOP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

db_results <- setNames(vector("list", length(db_defs)), names(db_defs))
total      <- nrow(file_list)

for (i in seq_len(total)) {
  fp     <- file_list$filepath[i]
  doc_id <- file_list$doc_id[i]
  message(sprintf("[%d/%d] %s", i, total, basename(fp)))

  for (db_name in names(db_defs)) {
    def <- db_defs[[db_name]]
    if (!sheet_exists(fp, def$tab)) next

    raw <- read_sheet_safe(fp, def$tab)
    if (is.null(raw) || nrow(raw) == 0L) next

    result <- if (def$mode == "fixed") {
      extract_fixed(raw, def, doc_id)
    } else {
      extract_dynamic(raw, def, doc_id)
    }

    if (!is.null(result) && nrow(result) > 0L)
      db_results[[db_name]] <- c(db_results[[db_name]], list(result))
  }
}

# ── 5. SAVE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

message("\nSaving to: ", output_dir)

for (db_name in names(db_defs)) {
  parts <- db_results[[db_name]]
  if (length(parts) == 0L) { message("  ", db_name, ": no data — skipped."); next }

  combined <- bind_rows(parts)
  out_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(db_name, ".csv"))
  write.csv(combined, out_path, row.names = FALSE, na = "")

  message(sprintf("  %-35s -> %d rows x %d cols  [%s]",
                  db_name, nrow(combined), ncol(combined), basename(out_path)))
}

message("\nDone.")
```
